AppFunctionAppMetadata.appfn:description:
This app is a Pokédex that allows browsing Pokémon data.
Operational Patterns: - Always call 'listPokemons' first to obtain valid pokemonId values before calling 'openPokemonDetail'. - Use 'listPokemons' to present the user with a list of Pokémons to choose from. - After the user picks a Pokémon, call 'openPokemonDetail' with the selected pokemonId to navigate directly to that Pokémon's detail screen.
Constraints: - 'listPokemons' returns the first 50 Pokémons from the Pokédex. - pokemonId values are positive integers returned by 'listPokemons'.
